Text.Page:
, it has been a long time since we last talked to each other! I hope you have been well.

I have a favor to ask of you. A friend asked me for help, but I cannot leave Elleon just now. I was wondering if you could go there in my place, and help my friend.

I am sure the reward will be well worth your time and effort.

My friend's name is Penrik. Show him the enclosed letter, and tell him that I recommended you!

- Jelena
What are you looking at, stranger? Be on your way before you get hurt.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"Jelena asked me to come."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

What? Jelena gave you a letter for me?

Let me see that.

Hmm...I guess you really are Jelena's friend.

Well, it seems I have no other choice. Very well, follow me. But I cannot guarantee you that you will come back in one piece. It’s just that dangerous.

Listen carefully, because time is short.

In the next few minutes, my comrades will arrive with treasure we secured from a stone giant. The giant will be close behind them. We need you to delay the giant long enough for us to move the treasure up the pass.

My comrades are waiting just on the other side of the barricade. When you're ready, use the lever over here to signal them—then prepare to battle a stone giant!

To be honest, I didn’t expect you'd put up much of a fight against the giant, but I have to admit that Jelena chose well. Remind me to buy you a drink some day.

Here's the pay I promised Jelena—and when you see her, give her my regards.
